speaker: speaker1
text: I would like to buy a black suit .

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you have any special brand in your mind ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , I never wear suit in my everyday life . I just want one to take part in my sister ’ s wedding ceremony .

speaker: speaker2
text: I see . Have a look at this one . It ’ s very cheap because it ’ s not very durable .

speaker: speaker1
text: but it looks good . Let me try it on .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ok , the mirror is over there .
